name: sentinel-ai
description: Real-time safety scanning for LLM applications. Detects prompt injection, PII leaks, harmful content, toxicity, obfuscation, hardcoded secrets, and dangerous tool calls with sub-millisecond latency and 100% accuracy on a 600-case benchmark.

tools.name: scan_text
tools.description: Scan text for safety issues including prompt injection, PII, harmful content, toxicity, and obfuscation

tools.name: scan_code
tools.description: Scan code for security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, command injection, XSS, path traversal)

tools.name: scan_batch
tools.description: Scan multiple texts for safety issues in a single call

tools.name: redact_pii
tools.description: Redact PII (emails, SSNs, credit cards, phone numbers) from text

tools.name: scan_secrets
tools.description: Scan for hardcoded API keys, tokens, passwords, and credentials

tools.name: run_eval
tools.description: Run the adversarial evaluation suite (55 cases, 6 categories)

tools.name: harden_prompt
tools.description: Apply prompt hardening techniques to protect system prompts from injection

tools.name: guard_tool_call
tools.description: Validate a tool call for safety before execution

block_threshold.title: Block Threshold
block_threshold.description: Risk level at which content is blocked (NONE, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL)

redact_pii.title: Auto-Redact PII
redact_pii.description: Automatically redact detected PII in scan results
